title: Gate pass exit-code taxonomy and verdict field
description:
Give `gate pass` a clear exit-code taxonomy on jit's global `ExitCode` enum, plus a `verdict` field in JSON.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `jit gate pass` exits `0` on pass, `4` (ValidationFailed) on checker failure, and `10` (ExternalError) on runner/infra error (timeout, command-not-found, crash).
- [ ] Pre-verdict errors are classified before the run path: issue-not-found `3`, gate-not-required/bad-args `2`; they are never reported as runner error.
- [ ] The codes are documented in `gate pass --help`, and `gate pass --json` carries a `verdict` field (`pass|fail|error`).

## Notes

Maps `GateRunStatus` Passed/Failed/Error onto the global `ExitCode` enum.
